programme.title: Hot Pursuit (2015)
programme.desc: In this riotous spin on the mismatched buddy movie, an uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the gregarious widow (Sofía Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen!

programme.title: Snitch (2013)
programme.desc: A father (Dwayne Johnson) goes undercover for the DEA in order to free his son who was imprisoned after being set up in a drug deal.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Dwayne Johnson stars as an NYPD detective trying to solve the biggest cash heist in U.S. history.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper (2011)
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring that is trying to steal top-secret information.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Judge Travis asks the gang to ride shotgun for a wagon train that is headed for disputed homestead land that a rancher intends to have for himself.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: The wagon train is attacked and bombed in an attempt to get the people to give up their titles to their homesteads.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Judge Travis presides over an exasperating trial that hits close to home for Nathan.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: The Seven try to stop the abuse of Chinese laborers working railroad construction.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When J.D. kills a man trying to rob the bank, one of his stray bullets accidentally kills an innocent woman.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: It was a classic motion picture. Now the adventure of the big-screen Old West comes to television, in the tale of seven men committed to one cause.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Born To Fight
programme.desc: Matthew, the nerdy new kid in town has a passion for boxing and the school bully is the resident boxing champion dominating all opponents, until now.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: An innocent girl is kidnapped and held hostage for two years causing her to develop multiple personalities and making her the number one suspect when her English professor is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Starring Paula Trickey, Thomas Calabro, and Al Sapienza. When a popular Philadelphia restaurant critic suspects that her husband is cheating on her, she hires a private investigator who turns out to have his own agenda.

programme.title: Encounter with Danger
programme.desc: As Jack leaves town for business, he seizes the opportunity to take Lori along so that they rekindle their relationship. But when he disappears, Lori discovers that Jack was about to reveal the corruption that exists within the company…

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Metropolis
programme.desc: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working class prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: The Adventures of Greyfriars Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby, a brave Skye Terrier, becomes a local legend when he refuses to leave his master's grave after he dies. Based on true events.

programme.title: The Lost Medallion
programme.desc: Billy Stone and Allie, two 13-year-old friends, uncover a long-lost medallion and accidentally wish themselves back in time. In order for Billy to save Allie's life, he must give up the medallion to the evil warlord, Cobra, who rules the island.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie and Ashleigh hit house removal hell on a mud-bogged mission out of Brisbane.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross-country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge wrestles flooded roads to deliver fuel to farmers.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi risks a showdown with the law as he heads into south Australia.

programme.title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes
programme.desc: A group of scientists band together to save the world from mutated tomatoes that KILL! (1978)

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A young officer in Napoleon's Army pursues a mysterious woman to the castle of an elderly Baron.

programme.title: Transylvania 6-5000
programme.desc: Two tabloid reporters (Jeff Goldblum, Ed Begley Jr.) go to a strange land to check on rumors of monsters running amok.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a washed-up boxer who is found floating in a pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The disappearance of a casino employee leads the police to uncover a UFO cult.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine and Brass investigate when dominatrix Lady Heather is almost strangled to death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: After Sara is abducted by the 'Miniature Killer', the CSIs must search the desert for her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs work with the FBI to investigate the murders of a young boy and a woman.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The hunt for the copycat serial killer ends in a race against time to find a missing woman

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson
programme.desc: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Dinoshark
programme.desc: A prehistoric shark unfreezes from an Arctic glacier and finds a feeding ground full of tourists and locals near Puerto Vallarta, Mexico.

programme.title: Dinocroc vs. Supergator
programme.desc: A biotech company creates two gigantic reptiles in a secret island laboratory. When the massive creatures escape, an undercover investigator, a Fish and Game officer and a swamp hunter team up to track down and kill the beasts.

programme.title: Spiders 3D
programme.desc: After an old Soviet space station crashes into a New York City subway tunnel, spiders begin mutating into gigantic monsters.

programme.title: One Good Turn
programme.desc: A promise that an orphan will receive a model car leads to zany adventures.

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A group of students at an elite music school decide to share a flat in order to cut their living costs and have somewhere to practice together. They get into quite a few scraps and adventures, including impersonating a celebrity quintet.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young
programme.desc: Grammar school co-eds fight the establishment after their teacher is fired for buying instruments for the students.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick's case of a deceased skydiver takes an interesting turn when Catherine discovers there may be a connection between the skydiver and a mysterious double murder case.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy run into each other at a science fiction convention for one of their favorite classic television shows, they end up investigating the murder of one of their beloved actors.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to resolve a gas station robbery but discover it’s connected to a deadly crisis on a cult compound.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.desc: Mircea Monroe gets a gospel song from Wayne and Gary, while Colin reports from people with bad feet, an Irish Drinking song about divorce and the album Songs of Florida is sold. (S12, E09)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show, incl. a lively round of "Questions" at airport security & guest Tiffany Coyne blasting out an 80s anthem in "Duet". (S12, E12)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Film & Theater Styles'; 'Props'; 'Helping Hands'; 'Musical Producers'; 'World Worst'; 'Song Styles'.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: The team come up with some wild uses for two very oddly shaped props. In Greatest Hits, Jeff and Wayne sing songs of zookeepers in the styles of Pavarotti, Russian Folk & Chinese opera. (S3, E28)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Ryan & Colin tackle a gang of international criminals with the help of audience member noises. The performers also make a visit to an adult-themed Sesame St. in "Scenes From A Hat". (S13, E06)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Let's Make a Date, Animals, Daytime Talk Show, World's Worst, Props, Strange Bedfellows, Moving People.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Wayne sings a Prince-style ballad about special guest Padma Lakshmi, and flirty housewife Heather has to make a move on hunky mechanic Ryan in "Hollywood Director". (S2, E18)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Colin has his hands full with Ryan, Jeff & Quasimodo Wayne in "Hollywood Director". Plus, learn things you can say about a movie, but not your partner in "Scenes from a Hat". (S2, E14)

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man is in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock: Annihilator
programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.title: Matlock: Network
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: The pressure is on to deliver a sequel to Spider-man, without a finished script. The clock is ticking in the battle between CGI and puppets, but will the chaos derail the train?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Despite his success, Sam Raimi loses his creative freedom as Marvel and Sony’s tug of war begins to affect the story. Spider-man 3 conquers the box office but loses the fans, as Sam decides whether to carry on or walk away.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Sony reboots the franchise with a new director and a new Spider-man, but can this new version compete with the rise of the MCU? When hackers attack Sony, their plans for the webslinger come undone and an unprecedented deal is struck.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Spider-man comes home to Marvel, but can Marvel and Sony get along enough to keep him there? The franchise comes full circle, bringing everyone back together in a time of crisis.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Belleville Rendez-Vous
programme.desc: When her grandson is kidnapped during the Tour de France, Madame Souza and her beloved pooch Bruno team up with the Belleville Sisters--an aged song-and-dance team from the days of Fred Astaire--to rescue him.

programme.title: Buena Vista Social Club
programme.desc: A group of elder forgotten Cuban music legends emerge from obscurity when an American producer reunites them in Havana, leading to spectacular performances that reignite their musical legacy.

programme.title: Every Thing Will Be Fine
programme.desc: One day, driving aimlessly around the outskirts of town after a trivial domestic quarrel, a writer named Tomas accidentally hits and kills a child. Will he be able to move on?

programme.title: Kings of the Road
programme.desc: A traveling projection-equipment mechanic works in Western Germany along the East-German border, visiting worn-out theatres. He meets with a depressed young man whose marriage has just broken up, and the two decide to travel together.

programme.title: 60 days in jail

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown's affair with a singer (Susan Saint James) comes to a tragic end; with Steve Carlson, Donnelly Rhodes.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside suspects a missing Soviet track star has defected to be with a girl who already defected years before; guest Steve Ihnat.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside must determine whether the chief of staff of a neo-facist group was murdered; with Gene Raymond.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown pursues a suspect (Pernell Roberts) in the killing of two police officers; with Ruta Lee.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A police officer frustrated by debt and illness walks off his second job as a bank guard with $150,000.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside reviews a last, cryptic conversation with a chess-playing friend to find a clue to the man's murder; guest Nicholas Colasanto.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Bounty Hunters
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are on the search to arrest a wanted criminal who has jumped bail. As they search for the man, they run into a bounty hunter named MacGruder (guest star Brian Dennehy), who is looking for the same man, complicating matters.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Baby Brokers
programme.desc: After an infant is abandoned, Cagney and Lacey end up deep in the world of underground baby merchants. Meanwhile, Lacey seriously considers adopting the infant. Cagney deals with a new love who doesn't approve of her profession.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Partners
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) is injured while in the line of duty by a fleeing liquor store robber. While Cagney is out recovering, Lacey (Tyne Daly) must come to terms with working with a new, temporary, partner. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Choices
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey must find a new witness after their key witness in a case against a shady landlord passes away. They take to canvasing the building in question in the hopes of finding a new witness before the landlord is set free.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Child Witness
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are brought in by a school principal to investigate whether or not a six-year-old girl is being sexually abused. Things become more complicated when the little girl is coached by her father to recant her tale.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Dadzilla/Tag Team Trouble
programme.desc: Kootie Pie and Big Mouth are convinced they are much too beautiful to be adopted!/Toad thinks he has lost the million gold coins the Princess had him deliver.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas
programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded

programme.title: Avalanche: Man Versus Earth

programme.title: Dust Storm

programme.title: Killer Asteroid

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Gail has a leaky ceiling and bowing floor boards but can't make repairs because her house is packed full. Meanwhile, Warren's fridge collection is putting his son at risk.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman's hoarding tears her family apart, while a man's girlfriend threatens to leave him if he doesn't clean up his hobby items.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman stands to lose her beloved home if she doesn't remove the filth and animal carcasses inside. A teenager demands that his parents clean up their stash of Halloween items and other assorted junk.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Andrew's mum is a hoarder and, having lived in a tip all his life, he too has no idea how to be tidy. Lydia must clean up fast or say goodbye to her son.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Vula's home is overrun with more than 30 sickly and deceased cats. Meanwhile, Lisa's hoarding is affecting her work and she is at risk of losing another job.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Container collector and shopaholic Nora confronts both her obsessions and her dire financial state. Wilma is forced to clear up her home before it is condemned.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack Draft

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Brand of Brothers
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image, so he and the guys create their own new logo and business cards. Meanwhile, Willie and Phil help Bella with her science project.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa

programme.title: Edgemont

programme.title: Edgemont

programme.title: Edgemont

programme.title: Edgemont

programme.title: Killer Town

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Ruthin Castle

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Karl & Stuart take on one of the Most Haunted rooms in this ancient castle. Whatever is there, seems desperate to make itself known.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF ANCIENT CULTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries associated with ancient cultures including Lemuria, the Indus Valley civilization of Harappa, the Forgotten Kingdoms of Tibet, the Olmec civilization of Central America.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET CULTS AND ORDERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at secret cults and mysterious orders including Skull and Bones at Yale University, the Freemasons, Thule and Vril Societies, the Bullingdon Club, the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: NATURE’S MAGIC
programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare new missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia

programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Curse of the Mayan Treasure: An explorer at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by an underwater fog, thousands of fish jump to their deaths, and a UFO is spotted in LA skies.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Beast That Ate Jaws: A shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, and experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is filmed near Russia's Area 51.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Omen of Blood River: A river of blood washes through a city in Bangladesh, an ominous noise scares a Canadian town and a giant hole appears in the clouds above California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Return of the Ice Monster: A giant ice creature is spotted in Alaska, a jet has a close encounter with a UFO, and evidence of a lightning strike invites paranormal speculation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Incident at Area 51: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. Strange beams of light are reported in Argentina.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: America's Loch Ness Monster: A Loch Ness Monster-esque creature is recorded in America, experts analyse evidence of a giant scaly egg, and birds are vaporized by a death ray.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Solomon Islands in WW II was a series of naval and air engagements between Allied and Japanese forces, fought around the strategically vital Guadalcanal, resulting in a pivotal Allied victory and turning the tide in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: World War II aircraft included iconic planes like the Japanese Zero, American F4U Corsair, and the Grumman F6F Hellcat, engaging in intense dogfights and strategic bombing campaigns across vast expanses of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Kokoda Track in World War II was a treacherous mountainous trail in Papua New Guinea, where intense jungle warfare unfolded between Australian and Japanese forces during the Kokoda Track campaign, marking a crucial phase in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gilbert Islands in WW II was a pivotal amphibious assault by the U.S. against heavily fortified Japanese positions, resulting in intense, costly fighting and ultimately securing a crucial step in the Central Pacific island strategy.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Marshall Islands were strategically significant in World War II as their capture by the United States provided forward bases for airfields and naval operations, facilitating the Allied island-hopping campaign towards Japan in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: Battle of Guadalcanal in WW II was a fiercely contested six-month-long campaign between Allied and Japanese forces, primarily fought on land, sea, and air around the Solomon Islands.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Peleliu in World War II was a grueling amphibious assault by U.S. forces against heavily fortified Japanese positions on the Pacific island, lasting from September to November 1944 and resulting in significant casualties on both sides.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The fighting on Iwo Jima in WW II involved intense and brutal combat between U.S. Marines and entrenched Japanese forces on a strategically crucial volcanic island in the Pacific.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: Boeing B-29: Superfortress
programme.desc: The story of the prolonged development and the initially troubled operational history of the Boeing B-29 Superfortress. Forever known as the airframe that dropped the first atomic weapons on Japan, the B-29 lived on well beyond its war years.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: The war enters its third year with battlefields in Eastern Europe, North Africa and the Asia/Pacific. The Battle of Midway, a battle with irreversible consequences, is a victory for the USA.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Stunning, newly colorised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B17: The mighty Flying Fortress takes to the air as we examine the background and development of one of WWII's most iconic bombers.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: February, 1943, a B-25 Mitchell Bomber crashes into Sharp Top Mountain. It was the third training crash in the area that night. What really caused this accident?

programme.desc: The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Arthur: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous
programme.desc: Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: Arthur: Popular Girls/Buster's Growing Grudge
programme.desc: Sue Ellen and Fern take a popularity quiz in a magazine and change their personalities to become more likable, but it backfires. And Buster's convinced that his great joke will be the difference between a successful oral report and failure.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Donatello tells the other three Turtles that, based on his calculations, the Earth has changed its orbit and is heading for the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Nightmare in the Lair
programme.desc: Down in the sewers, while Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael are watching yet another cheesy sci-fi film, Donatello is busy building the dream-o-vision.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Phantom of the Sewers
programme.desc: After another night's performance of the robotic Willie Wombat Revue at the Willie Wombat Revue Theatre, a mysterious figure, wearing a long black cape, black fedora, white face mask, and known only as the Phantom, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo is Missing
programme.desc: When Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raphael return from the video arcade they discover that Donatello's lab is in disarray and Leonardo is missing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Snakes Alive!
programme.desc: While practicing their martial arts, Leonardo tells Splinter that he is convinced that there is one combat maneuver he has yet to teach the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Polly Wanna Pizza
programme.desc: Michelangelo returns from his sojourn to the pet shop with a monkey named Clyde. After only a few minutes with the undisciplined pet Leonardo, Donatello and Raphael demand that it be returned to the pet shop.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: It's been six months since Son Goku and Vegeta defeated the dangerous Majin Buu in a terrible clash. Thanks to Dragon Balls, the people on the Earth do not remember what happened. Peace has returned to Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta had promised Trunks to take him to the theme park. In the end, the whole family happily goes on a day trip. But Vegeta isn't so thrilled, he would have preferred to train to keep up with Goku.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fearing what might happen knowing that the God of Destruction is awake, the Old Supreme Kai and Supreme Kai urge King Kai to ensure that Goku never finds out about Beerus.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Our hungry heroes arrive at a small village. In return for a meal, Ash, Misty, and Brock agree to investigate what is causing the river to dry up, destroying the village’s harvest.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: We join our heroes on the outskirts of Dark City, which appears to be deserted. Even during the middle of the day, there is no one on the streets. What has happened to make this place so desolate?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash is hard at work, continuing his rigorous training schedule even over spring vacation—until our heroes discover there’s a traveling carnival nearby! Ash, Misty, and Brock quickly join in the fun of the fair!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Still in hot pursuit of our heroes, Team Rocket is ready to make yet another attempt to catch Pikachu—until disaster strikes! It soon becomes apparent that Meowth is getting sick!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Putting her idea of catching Jigglypuff aside for now, Misty promises to find a solution to this Pokémon’s singing situation!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: According to Ash’s rival Gary, fossils from extinct Pokémon have been discovered in the area, triggering a great fossil rush in the canyon. Ash decides to join in the excavation as a chance to beat Gary!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash is sleeping peacefully until he is awoken by Brock and Misty with alarming news: there’s something wrong with Pikachu’s voice! When Ash becomes concerned, he runs to the nearest Pokémon Center with Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: As our heroes are walking in the countryside, they notice a 'Missing Persons' poster of an undeniably familiar face: it looks exactly like James from Team Rocket! Is it really him in the poster?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Our heroes discuss the rumor that a rare wild Farfetch has been seen in the area. Ash and Misty both vow to catch it, and soon they get their chance when the Pokémon appears!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On leaving the Pokémon Center, our heroes discuss what they think will hatch from the Pokémon Egg Ash discovered. Nearby, Team Rocket begins hatching another daring plan to make it theirs!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: During a battle with another Trainer’s Rhyhorn, the bulb on Bulbasaur’s back begins to glow, prompting Ash to take it to the local Pokémon Center. They soon discover that Bulbasaur isn’t sick—it’s getting ready to evolve!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch two boys having their hair cut. A mirror appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Dipsy and Tinky Winky liked looking at their reflection in the mirror.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a group of children washing their goat in the river. In Teletubbyland it’s time for Tubby Custard. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa spilled custer on themselves.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making marks. They use paint and different objects to make a colourful picture.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies love to run round and round Teletubbyland, but stop to watch three children make some modelling dough to play with. The Tubby Toaster makes a big piece of Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children crawling. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies are crawling. Tinky Winky crawled along the path, Dipsy crawled over the hill, Laa-Laa crawled between the trees and Po crawled around the flowers.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle together as they hold hands and side step around Home Hill. They watch three children build a jigsaw puzzle and try to guess what the picture is.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hungry horse. In Teletubbyland, Po is playing with Laa-Laa's ball, she doesn't want to give it back until she sees her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies dance a Bumps-a-daisy dance and then watch some children decorating lots of boxes to make a big caterpillar. A Jack in a Box appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up and run off to watch some children tell a story with their drawings. Laa-Laa goes for a walk and as she walks she sings a song about what she sees.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po and Tinky Winky love to smell flowers. They have great fun running between two groups of flowers smelling them with great big sniffs.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Dwayne Johnson stars as an NYPD detective trying to solve the biggest cash heist in U.S. history.

programme.title: Walking Tall
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a retired soldier who returns to his hometown only to discover the place he grew up is now overrun with crime, drugs and violence. Enlisting the help of his old pal, Chris gets elected Sheriff and fights to clean up his hometown.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: A newly married couple discovers disturbing, ghostly images in photographs they develop after an eerie accident in which they believe they may have hit a young girl with their car.

programme.title: Zookeeper: Zookeeper (2011)
programme.desc: The animals at one particular zoo decide to break their code of silence in order to help their lovable zookeeper gain the attention of one particular woman.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm’s (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: Satan's School for Girls
programme.desc: A made-for-TV occult horror classic.

programme.title: Naked as Nature Intended
programme.desc: Naked As Nature Intended sees four young beauties enjoying the sights of the West Country while exploring the joys of nudism. A nudie-cutie feature from the early days of naturism!

programme.title: Nudes of the World
programme.desc: A group of international beauty queens turn an English stately home into a nudist camp – and everyone has a swinging time! Top T&A with narration by Blue Peter’s Valerie Singleton!

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: It was a classic motion picture. Now the adventure of the big-screen Old West comes to television, in the tale of seven men committed to one cause.

programme.title: The Magnificent Texan
programme.desc: Judge Wilkins is the head of a gang of criminals who wreaks havoc in the Mexican town of Santa Clara. A young man named Manuel Lopez in love with his daughter Evelyn, gives up taking revenge on the man but not putting an end to their bloody deeds.

programme.title: The Great Adventure
programme.desc: Set during the American Gold Rush era, this is an unforgettable tale of an orphaned boy and his wild dog who must battle against the Yukon wilderness and human greed to help save a frontier town. Starring: Jack Palance, Joan Collins, Elisabetta Virgili

programme.title: Ballad of Death Valley: Ballad of Death Valley
programme.desc: An 'angel-faced' gunfighter is tasked with infiltrating a ranch overrun by Mexican bandits and saving their hostages, including the fiancée of the local sheriff.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Encounter with Danger
programme.desc: As Jack leaves town for business, he seizes the opportunity to take Lori along so that they rekindle their relationship. But when he disappears, Lori discovers that Jack was about to reveal the corruption that exists within the company…

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: The cult classic from Nicolas Winding Refn (Drive) follows drug pusher Frank as he comes to blows with Copenhagen’s underworld.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Jurassic Expedition
programme.desc: After a deep space exploration vessel discovers a potentially habitable planet, a scouting team is dispatched. Once on the ground, their reconnaissance mission soon turns into a battle for survival against the planet's hostile alien lifeforms.

programme.title: LX 2048
programme.desc: In the near future, the sun has become so toxic people can no longer leave their houses in daytime, and normal life is conducted mostly inside the virtual realm.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel
programme.desc: In this fantastical retelling of the classic tale, two teenage siblings must escape from an evil recluse living in the woods. Starring Taylor Momsen ("Gossip Girl"), Dakota Fanning ("Twilight"), Jacob Smith and Lynn Redgrave.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi risks a showdown with the law as he heads into south Australia.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Once, inmates in Armenian prisons fell into the hands of the "Thieves in Law," a criminal brotherhood rejecting state authority and living by its own code.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Undercover Agents
programme.desc: Tips from undercover agents lead to a high-speed chase and a shootout in Panama City. In Cartagena, Colombia, a tip leads the Armada on a wild goose chase before they track down the real smugglers.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Manhunt
programme.desc: Panamanian police go on a manhunt for a notorious gang leader trying to smuggle drugs; at the same time, the USS Rentz race to get across the Panama Canal in time to make a bust.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Engine Fail
programme.desc: The engineers on the USS Rentz must repair their ship in time. They need to go quick to catch up with suspected traffickers. Panamanian troops venture in to the remote jungle to confront a violent paramilitary army from Colombia smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Drug Wars: High-Speed Night Chase
programme.desc: The USS Rentz chase down suspected smugglers before they escape into Colombia's territorial waters. Meanwhile, the Colombian Navy and an American surveillance plane hunt down suspects off the coast of Cartagena.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Chong Chon Gang
programme.desc: Panamanian forces spend days searching a suspicious North Korean cargo ship. This ship attempts to cross the Panama Canal. The North Korean crew try to sabotage the inspection, but the Panamanians uncover something shocking.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Race for the Secret Stash
programme.desc: The Colombian Navy receive intel about a secret stash buried on islands near the port of Cartegena. It becomes a race with the traffickers to recover the drugs.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Hunting in the Dark

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something's in here

programme.title: Psychic Witness

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a young man meets a mystery woman, then vanishes. In New Jersey, a teenage girl disappears walking home from school. In each case, a psychic saw everything.

programme.title: Psychic Witness

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: In Illinois, a teenage boy goes to interview for a job and vanishes. In New Jersey, two women are abducted and brutally murdered. Police turn to Carol Broman, Dorothy Allsion, and Nancy Orlen Weber, psychics who help them catch the killers.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Out of Bounds

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: NATURE’S MAGIC
programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1941, Germany looted the Amber Room, an extraordinary art installation from the Soviet Union, deemed the eighth wonder of the world. Taken to Konigsberg, it vanished by war's end, sparking a decades-long hunt.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Nobody
programme.desc: We’re putting the action-packed film Nobody to the test. Booby Traps, Claymores and Riot shields make for an interesting day at the range.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry’s Underworld
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: We Hear Ya
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to see if he can make it as a Three Musketeer! Can he throw his sword and kill the enemy?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.

programme.title: World War A - When Aliens Attack
programme.desc: Are there extraterrestrials and what will happen when aliens attack us?

programme.title: Wild Asia: Island Magic
programme.desc: Asia is the continent of islands: at its southern limit alone there are some 30,000 islands dashed across the watery surface of the world.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: The Predators of the River Tiber
programme.desc: Two large water birds are experiencing a real demographic boom that seems unstoppable.

programme.title: Wild Asia: A Forest All Seasons

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Greed is Good
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tears for Fears
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
