programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Monsters

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Freaks of Nature

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The Battle of Okinawa in WW II was a fierce and prolonged amphibious assault by Allied forces against well-defended Japanese positions on the island, marking the largest and bloodiest battle in the Pacific theater.

programme.title: Pacific Inferno: Warriors of WWII
programme.desc: The end of World War II in the Pacific was marked by dropping atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in August 1945, prompting Japan's surrender, formalized on September 2, 1945, aboard the USS Missouri, effectively ending the conflict in the Pacific.

programme.title: World War II: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: The battles of the first world war were battles of attrition and trenches; the battles of the second world war were vastly different. In this episode we study tank battles, blitzkrieg, commando raids, amphibious landings, and mobile warfare in the desert.

programme.title: Armistice
programme.desc: Professor David Reynolds uncovers a story of wounded egos, political scheming and strategy behind the lines as statesmen and generals haggled over the terms of peace, while the soldiers fought on the front-line.

programme.title: Oppenheimer: The Real Story
programme.desc: The documentary covers Oppenheimer's contribution to nuclear physics as a professor and leader of the Los Alamos Laboratory.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: February, 1943, a B-25 Mitchell Bomber crashes into Sharp Top Mountain. It was the third training crash in the area that night. What really caused this accident?

programme.title: Silver Spitfire: The Longest Flight
programme.desc: A British expeditionary team attempt a dangerous, world-first circumnavigation of the Earth in an 80-year-old vintage World War II fighter to inspire a new generation through the freedom of flight.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A 25-year-old feud over a shed comes to a head when one neighbor decides to demolish it with his truck; a hoard of fireworks suddenly explodes at a neighborhood block party; a Denver man tries to retrieve his neighbor's stolen mountain bike.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two neighbors feud over access to a boat ramp; in an incredible act of bravery, a man pulls an elderly neighbor out of a raging house fire; an armed face-off between neighbors in Texas has tragic consequences.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman allegedly sets her home on fire while a neighbor is inside; a man calls for backup from his friends after arguing with his neighbor over car noise; a hero with a recycling bin saves a Florida neighborhood threatened by an angry alligator.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Shirts come off and the fists fly when best friends and neighbors become sworn enemies; a porch pirate receives an instant dose of karma; an officer gets the surprise of his life when he pulls over a self-proclaimed superhero in a thong.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman in an apartment complex bashes her neighbor's door with a dumbbell; a late-night load of laundry enrages a neighbor trying to sleep; a neighbor takes exception to workers stepping over the property line to install a French drain.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Arizona man and his family endure years of intimidation from one of their neighbors; a disagreement over the feeding of stray cats leads to gunshots being fired into a neighbor's apartment; an infant dangles from a high-rise balcony.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man is unjustly accused of being an outsider when he tries to use the community trash cans; chaos ensues when two old-timers clash over the same disabled parking spot; a high school soccer player tackles a neighborhood package thief.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family's Easter celebration is shattered by neighbors hurling insults; a community comes together after a woman is witnessed mistreating kittens; when neighbors battle over a parking space, one man retaliates by writing a diss track.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Landlords get a shock when their next-door tenant moves out; a stolen school bus in Brooklyn, N.Y., smashes up the block as the driver tries to escape from the cops; a Halloween prank in Cincinnati requires a neighbor's help to deflate the problem.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Korg's theft of a scroll from Naroom's library sends our heroes in pursuit of the Shadow Magi to the forbidding desert realm of the Sands of D’Resh. They ride aboard a Quanjuel – a horse-like creature that can travel through magical vortexes.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Aerrow and Radarr make a break from the escape-proof prison on Terra Zartacla. With jail warden Mr. Moss on their tail, our two heroes set out to prove anything’s possible when you’re a Storm Hawk

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: It’s Master Mayhem’s birthday! But what do you get for the galactic overlord who has everything? TOTAL CONTROL OVER THE EARTH! Now Dome Diddy Dome is coming to crush us all, and make Master Mayhem’s birthday wish come true.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Piper pretends to quit the team to teach the boys a lesson, but it’s going to take everyone working together to stop Ravess and her dangerous plan to shut down the Storm Hawks for good.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar races in and tells the KFDP that they have to go to the Miss Megalopolis Beauty Pageant. Jet’s heard about human pageants and he’s all excited. But Edgar tells him to calm down – their mission is to retrieve one of Skor’s gems!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: The Gore - LINK VRAINS’ biggest and boldest bruiser - is looking to pin Playmaker for the three count!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The search for the Moonlands Diamond leads the Final Dreamers back to the void energy island. This time, they find themselves in the path of a greedy, treasure-hunting bunch of Realm Raider pirates, who trap Gorgram and steal the gem!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Johnny and Maggie find themselves trapped in the Andes, by a reclusive tribe who refuse to let them leave for fear that their life of solitude will be disrupted.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The team is in London to see their friend Razor in concert. During the show, the Anarchitechs shut down power to the entire City, signaling their grand return.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt get super fantastic mega powers!

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Professor Squakencluck shows off his time machine. However, when Penfold gets too close to the machine's targeted area, he is sucked into the past, 150 million years ago, in exchange for a dinosaur egg. Danger Mouse heads back to look for him.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback devises a ray that animates London's statues and causes them to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Astro Duck
programme.desc: Duckula's new computer causes problems for TRASH and ends up landing the castle on the moon.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'A Hard Days Pink': When Pinky's fairy god manager transforms five animals into a piano, Pinky tries to win the big battle of the bands contest. 'You Only Pink Twice': Secret agent Panther must deliver a top-secret valise to the president.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted prove a point to a skeptical Mr. Scanlon, the music teacher, that rock 'n' roll and classical music are actually one and the same.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mask enters the Baja race. But when Miles Mayem shows up for the race in Buzzard, it's apparent this is more than just a mere race.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Count and the Pauper
programme.desc: Duckula is sick of life at the castle and plans to leave Beckindale.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Jesse James hid gold worth millions in a cave in the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted find themselves with a problem: how to get part-time jobs when they have no experience. They manage to get references from Marie Antoinette and Lucretia Borgia but decide that working on music is preferable to working at a real job.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback kidnaps Penfold to lure Danger Mouse into a spaceship and send both of them to a planet ruled by old fashioned looking machines.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Enchanted Pinkdom

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM uses laser beams to dry up a waterfall in order to uncover the ancient Scarlet Empress.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9

programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a terrace house close to the river in London. In Malmesbury, Wiltshire there's part of a garden up for grabs with outline planning permission for a bungalow.

programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Southampton, a property in London and a three bedroom end of terrace in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur: When Duty Calls – Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.

programme.title: Arthur: He Said, He Said/Bunny Trouble
programme.desc: A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur: Baseball Blues/Brain's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: It's Grebelings season and George can't wait to play! After all, no one knows more about baseball than George. Then, wBrain gets teamed with Buster and Binky in the annual Arithmattack competition.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Embarking on parallel paths to the top, The Rock and Triple H battle each other both in the ring and behind the scenes; Freddie Prinze Jr. and luminaries including Kevin Owens, Johnny Gargano and John "Bradshaw" Layfield break down this epic rivalry.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: When Seth Rollins began working for WWE, he heard some harsh truths from one of his idols, Triple H; under the guidance of The Game, Seth grew to become a champion and one of the handpicked faces of the company.

programme.title: Shutter

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Spaceballs

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Fatal Beauty
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg stars as a witty, street-smart L.A. narcotics cop who goes undercover to investigate a poisoned drug shipment in this explosive, romantic action-comedy. Co-stars Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Uptown Girls: Uptown Girls (2003)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: Nudes of the World
programme.desc: A group of international beauty queens turn an English stately home into a nudist camp – and everyone has a swinging time! Top T&A with narration by Blue Peter’s Valerie Singleton!

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: Vampire Hookers
programme.desc: Carradine is an aged vampire who has a bevy of vampiric beauties who lure many of their customers back to his lair. A pair of virile young Navy sailors get mixed up in their shenanigans.

programme.title: Frivolous Lola
programme.desc: Lola and Masetto are a young couple about to be married. While Masetto looks forward to make love to his bride-to-be on their wedding night, Lola is reluctant to betroth herself to him without first ensuring that he will be a good lover.

programme.title: Ballad of Death Valley: Ballad of Death Valley
programme.desc: An 'angel-faced' gunfighter is tasked with infiltrating a ranch overrun by Mexican bandits and saving their hostages, including the fiancée of the local sheriff.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: The Last of the Mohicans: The Printer
programme.desc: Arriving in a frontier town to deliver type from Benjamin Franklin to printer Nathan Peale, Hawkeye and Chingachgook find themselves involved in the midst of a battle for freedom of the press. Peale is arrested for the murder of his brother-in-law.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Shadow Warriors: Assault on Devil's Island
programme.desc: Hulk Hogan leads an elite Navy SEAL team chosen for an audacious mission to rescue a group of Americans being held captive by a drug lord's soldiers, who want their leader released.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: When a psychotic trucker takes offense at the pranks pulled by a couple of college students, the young kids are sucked into a whirlpool of terror.

programme.title: All The Old Knives

programme.title: LX 2048
programme.desc: In the near future, the sun has become so toxic people can no longer leave their houses in daytime, and normal life is conducted mostly inside the virtual realm.

programme.title: A.I. Rising

programme.title: Multiverse

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: A series of uncanny déjà vu events force a man to re-examine his tragic past, memory, instinct, and future.

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel

programme.title: The Man Without A Face

programme.title: Drug Wars: Hunting in the Dark

programme.title: Drug Wars: Operation Martillo's Biggest Busts
programme.desc: The biggest busts of Operation Martillo are recalled. It goes from the military operations on land and sea to the undercover agents and informants.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Run Around

programme.title: Drug Wars: Smugglers Pit Stop

programme.title: Drug Wars: Night Rider

programme.title: Drug Wars: Gunalaya
programme.desc: On this episode of Drug Wars, Panama’s Border Patrol battles Colombian cartels attempting new trafficking routes along an indigenous region of Gunayala.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Out Of The Dark

programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family

programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Still grieving for his lost love, Jake is seduced by a mysterious photographer who keeps him at a distance until she finally reveals her secret, she is married. Jake knows from bitter personal experience how dangerous a game this can be.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: The ‘Black Widower’ Malcolm Webster was a serial seducer who married three different women. The episode focuses on wife Claire, who Webster murdered in 1994, drugging and setting fire to the car she was in to fake a fatal car crash.

programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword
programme.desc: In Dimension X Krang is using a long-range scanner and discovers a rare metal buried in a ruined castle in England. The metal turns out to be King Arthur's legendary sword, Excalibur.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express
programme.desc: April is covering the revival of the Orient Express. Shredder is on the train with Rocksteady and Bebop carrying the supercharger, a device to accelerate the train to super speed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric Red seizes both April and Professor Swenson's map to the underground volcanoes in Scandinavia to tap into the molten energy and melt the polar ice caps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Elementary, My Dear Turtle
programme.desc: The Turtles are in England, when they are taken back to the past, via an experimental atomic clock and must team up with Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in order to get the clock back and return to the present.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Dark Turtle
programme.desc: When Donatello receives a jolt of electrical energy, he undergoes a radical personality transformation, turning into 'The Dark Turtle', a psychotic caped crimefighter on a mission of revenge against Shredder!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Starchild
programme.desc: The Turtles face a crisis of galactic proportions when they must play babysitter to an alien infant with incredible powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Legend of Koji
programme.desc: The Turtles take an incredible trip back in time when they follow Shredder back to 16th Century Japan, where they join forces with Splinter's ancestor, the youthful samurai koji, and help him found the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Convicts from Dimension X
programme.desc: Donatello, tinkering with his InterDimensional Early Warning System device, accidently frees two vicious convicts from their maximum security cell on Dimension X, bringing them to earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): White Belt, Black Heart
programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: At the Ranger's home, Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables you to learn anything within seconds thanks to electrodes hooked to the brain, meaning that he can become the perfect bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: An old metal box found by chance in a recess of a cliff brings back childhood memories for Grizzy and the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy struggles to watch a documentary on salmon fish, nice and comfy on the sofa, as the Lemmings play chemistry novices with a fun experiment box.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree. This is a case of absolute urgency.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the bear he's in love with. But the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he's spotted.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the ranger's new running shoes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy babysits for the she-bear he has a crush on. There's no question of Grizzy tripping up, as he has no intention of taking any risks, but he hasn't reckoned on the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Unwilling to share the food both he and the Lemmings are wild about, Grizzy locks it up inside the ranger's brand new and apparently burglar-proof safe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is impressed by the TV show of a magician who transforms a partridge into a bouquet of flowers. To get rid of the Lemmings once and for all, for they exasperate him with their incessant games, Grizzy tries the magic trick on them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: While Ash and the gang hurry to catch the last ferry off Cinnabar Island, they get sidetracked by a group of Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise that need assistance!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty's Horsea desperately needs exercise, so the gang decides to take it to her sisters' Gym in Cerulean City. There, she learns that her sisters are planning an exciting underwater ballet.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, and Misty get sidetracked on their way to Viridian City when all of their belongings mysteriously disappear. While searching for their missing things, they find themselves mixed up in a close encounter that’s really out of this world!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes make their way to Viridian City, where Ash hopes to earn the Earth Badge. They get to the Gym just in time to see his rival, Gary, being defeated by an unknown Pokémon—and Gary insists that it's evil!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: On their way back to Pallet Town, our heroes encounter a runaway Mr. Mime. Ash disguises himself as another Mr. Mime so he can get close. When Team Rocket strikes, will they catch the right Mr. Mime?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves at a fork in the road and decide to climb a steep and dangerous mountain. Pikachu gets lost, and they must all work together to find it, stay warm, and weather a storm.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: On a visit to Professor Oak’s house, Ash runs into Gary, and they talk about the upcoming Pokémon League. Professor Oak says they should learn from each other rather than competing, and that teamwork pays off when Team Rocket attacks!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and his mother take a vacation to Seafoam Island. While he's there, he's looking for the programmer of the Pokédex to learn about the peculiar evolution of SlowPoké. Team Rocket's bumbling brings to light this surprising mystery!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash wipes out during a surfing attempt, Victor rescues him and tells him about Humungadunga, a giant wave that sweeps through every 20 years. Can Ash and Pikachu give Victor the confidence he needs to catch the giant wave?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Back in Pallet Town, Ash, and friends meet Florinda, who works at the local nursery. Her Gloom won't evolve, so she’s afraid she's not training it properly. When Team Rocket attacks, everyone sees just how strong a Pokémon can become!

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bounce up and down until they spill their Tubby Custard. The Teletubbies watch a boy digging for potatoes with his Grandmother.

programme.desc: Today, the Teletubbies are relaxing, until it is time to watch Andy Brown and some children look in a stream to see what they can find. The Teletubbies are trying to be quiet, but Po is making too much noise.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A magic watering can appears in Teletubbyland, and Po has fun watering everything and watching them grow. The Teletubbies watch two children make ice cream sundaes with jelly, ice cream and other nice foods.

programme.desc: Gil Favor's drovers are delighted when a beautiful actress staggers into their camp -- until they learn she was once a Yankee spy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Intense pains in Ironside's legs cause him to enter the hospital for exploratory surgery to see if he can ever walk again.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: In the hospital, Ironside meets patients and staff, and a drug pusher determined to kill him.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.desc: During a drug raid, Cagney and Lacey arrest the man responsible for Dory McKenna's (guest star Barry Primus) drug rehabilitation on charges of narcotics possession. When the evidence disappears, Dory becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Lacey stops a woman's attempted suicide but feels guilt and responsibility when the woman turns up murdered soon after. When Cagney and Lacey investigate the murder, they soon discover a world of massive gambling debts and loan sharks.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Out Of Control
programme.desc: Cagney & Lacey investigate a homicide that occurred during an attempted burglary. They discover that the gun used was purchased illegally. In light of this information, Lacey also discovers that her son, Michael, has been playing with her revolver.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot

programme.title: Tsunami: Facing the Global Threat
programme.desc: Tsunamis are so sudden and powerful that in a matter of minutes, they can wipe out a coastline.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A multiple-vortex tornado struck Joplin, Missouri, in 2011. Meet the survivors who saw it happen.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: Floods can be one of the deadliest forces of nature. Scientists are working tirelessly to help stem the tide.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Gail has a leaky ceiling and bowing floor boards but can't make repairs because her house is packed full. Meanwhile, Warren's fridge collection is putting his son at risk.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: An expert team attempts to give two hoarders a clean start, including Janet who sleeps on a chair in an unheated house full of rubbish and Phyllis, who has an extensive collection of dolls.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Donald, Peter and Raymond are close friends who do everything together, including hoarding. Each of them now face their own personal crisis ranging from loss of property.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Margree married two years ago but her home is so full, her husband never moved in, and Kathleen's habit has forced her son to forgo a scholarship to protect his sister.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Diana's hoarding became so extreme that her daughter was forced to sleep in a recliner. Meanwhile, Dolores has accumulated a truly dangerous hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, Becky has hoarded her home and motel property, including furniture, clothes and appliances; featured experts are psychologist Dr. Robin Zasio and extreme cleanup expert Cory Chalmers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Christie snaps under the pressure of losing evyerthing. Old truths are finally uncovered as new ones are buried.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Lonely Hearts
programme.desc: (S01E008) Flirtation turns to frustration when Sandy finds herself being followed by a handsome young man named Paul after a particularly awkward date.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Responsibly Yours
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sticking around for the long haul becomes a test of courage for Billy when he dates a hot single mother, while Jake and Sandy question whether they have more in common than a fondness for sex.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Burned
programme.desc: (S01E010) Rhonda makes it her mission to help Billy after he's attacked in South Central, while Jake has difficulty getting past old wounds when his mother suddenly appears at his birthday.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Broken Promise
programme.desc: (S01E011) Sometimes bad thing happen to good people, and it's up to a rambunctious puppy and a friendly red-headed medical colleague named Kimberly to remind Jane and Michael what really matters.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Sum of Its Parts
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Fear and Loathing in the Milky Way
programme.desc: Gerentex is back, and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Devil Take the Hindmost
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society to stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Honey Offering
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Andromeda: Star-Crossed
programme.desc: Rommie's avatar falls in love with what turns out to be the avatar of a warship named Gabriel. Gabriel attempts to infect Rommie with a virus that broadcasts its plans to the warship.

programme.title: Andromeda: It Makes a Lovely Light
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: It is Danny's first day as State Vet and when he helps rescue some smuggled animals he feels he's making a difference. However, he discovers the role isn't going to be all plain sailing.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.desc: The murder of an elderly couple shocks a small New York town. An Ohio family searches for a missing woman.Two psychics saw everything that happened. Noreen Renier senses the killer is lying about his alibi. Georgia Rudolph leads police to the body.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: An Arkansas teen has been abducted. In California, a young man vanishes, leaving no clues. Psychics help both families find answers. When both cases grow bleak, the families contact psychics Carol Pate and Rosemarie Kerr to help find their loved ones.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: The historic Palmyra is haunted by a mother and her six children who died there in a fire two days before Christmas over 100 years ago.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A scientist discovers footage on his security camera that even he can't explain; and a sailing ship from the 1800's is home to a ghostly crew.

programme.title: My Ghost Story

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: A glamorous flight attendant disappears and the story makes headlines. An intense search reveals few clues. But a graveside discovery eventually forces police to take a second look at some already familiar faces.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip

programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence

programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Every Picture Tells A Story

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Wish
programme.desc: A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sweetheart Murders
programme.desc: The story of sweethearts Sabrina Gonsalves and John Riggins who were brutally murdered in Davis, California, in 1980. Initially, police suspected Gerald Gallego, but he was in jail at the time of the murders.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Year We Disappeared
programme.desc: In August 1979, John Busby, a Falmouth, Massachusetts police officer, was ambushed in his car by a gunman in a passing car who shot him in the face. Although wounded, Busby was able to write a note for police at the scene that said “Not an accident.”

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Auburn

programme.title: Something's Killing Me

programme.title: Something's Killing Me

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Hope and her family and friends were preparing for her funeral when they discover a shocking secret.

programme.desc: Brendan loves McKenna, but failed attempts to connect have left him wondering if McKenna is for real. Nev teams with social media sensation Karrueche Tran to help Brendan uncover the truth. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jaylin is prepared to sacrifice a lifelong friendship and promising videogame career to be with a woman he's never even spoken to on the phone. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chanelle is the light Michael needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ray is determined to meet his online love Lexi. After learning that her sister has meddled in their relationship in the past, Nev and Max find themselves asking more questions. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Two Thousand
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Deal
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Leona
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: TOD-5
programme.desc: To locate a terrorist ring called Alpha Group, the IMF convinces turncoat intelligence agent Gordon Holt (played by guest star Peter Haskell) that he's been exposed to the stolen biological weapon he's been hired to deliver.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cocaine
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler have an emotional visit with their daughter, Amber struggles during her first weeks of rehab and Farrah says farewell to her life in Iowa. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.title: Teen Mom

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber and Gary work on their relationship issues. Maci struggles to choose classes. Visiting her parents, Farrah is annoyed with their concerns for Sophia. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Robert is suing his young fling Latasha after claiming she damaged his property.

programme.title: NEW People's Court

programme.desc: Travis swears that Crystal cheated and denies their daughter. Shamika's fiancée wants him to take a DNA test to prove that he fathered their three kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Who's the Father of My 4 Kids... My Husband or My Lover?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: This is the tragic tale of Susan Smith, who shocked the nation in 1994 by fabricating a carjacking to cover up the drowning murders of her two young sons.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: University students Holly Dunn and Chris Maier are ambushed along railway tracks in August 1997. By 1999, a string of similar attacks leads police to Angel Maturino Reséndiz, who travels by freight train between murders across three states.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Murder by the Mob depicts the battle for justice by Peppino Impastato's family after his 1978 death was misclassified. His mother and brother reopened the case, leading to mafia boss Gaetano Badalamenti's 2002 conviction for the murder.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2004, Marc Dutroux was sentenced to life for kidnapping, raping, and murdering young girls in Belgium. His 1996 arrest and delayed trial exposed horrific crimes and official failings, sparking public outrage.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1983, Graeme Cunningham vanishes in Salt Lake City. Detective Don Bell discovers Arthur Bishop, who confesses to killing Graeme and four other boys. Bishop is found guilty in 1984 and executed in 1988.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: A demo of calorific value by taking part in the Oxbridge Boat Race; testing MP's abilities to calculate risk.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Zanzibar: Land of Giants
programme.desc: The Zanzibar Archipelago has been labeled the most exotic island chain in the world. Pristine sands and azure blue sea make it a much loved holiday destination. /The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. Each of the 7,000 islands are unique.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Munchkin finds a new purpose after the loss of her pups and Swift’s leadership is in question.

programme.desc: The Forth Rail Bridge has grown to symbolise Scotland.

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges: The Britannia Bridge
programme.desc: Rob Bell recounts the story of the Britannia Bridge.

programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Photo Op
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fight Like A Girl
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Higher Power
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission - convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a run away fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bus Stop Bruiser

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mama's Boys

programme.desc: This is the story of the creation of the Allied military from the small 100,000-man force of the post World War I era to the mighty military industrial complex that fought fascist forces around the world. 10 Hour Series

programme.desc: The US Coast Guard was the first branch of the US military to see action in WWII.

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Fifteen
programme.desc: How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues
programme.desc: Determined to stop the turtles once and for all, Shredder enlists some of the most memorable villains from past episodes into an army of 'rogues'!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles
programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.
